name: nat-vent-indoor-hot-outdoor-near-comfort
description: Hot interior (78F) with outdoor near comfort (74F) — activates since outdoor < indoor and outdoor < threshold

verdict.summary: When indoor is above comfort_cool and outdoor is below both indoor and threshold, nat vent activates

events.note: hot interior; outdoor 74F is above comfort_cool(72) but below indoor(78) and below threshold(75)

assertions.reason: outdoor 74F < indoor 78F (beneficial); outdoor 74F < threshold 75F (within ceiling); indoor 78F > comfort_heat 70F — nat vent activates for hot-day free cooling
